allow: Bash(/Applications/Postgres.app/Contents/Versions/latest/bin/psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U omarjan -d kitabim_ai -c "SELECT id, title, author, volume FROM books WHERE title LIKE ''%ئۇيغۇر تارىخى%'' OR title LIKE ''%ئويغور%'' OR title LIKE ''%تارىخى%'' LIMIT 10;")

Bash(/Applications/Postgres.app/Contents/Versions/latest/bin/psql "postgresql://omarjan@localhost:5432/kitabim_ai" -c "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM books GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as stale_pending FROM books WHERE status=''pending'' AND last_updated < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''30 minutes''; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as stale_ocr_done FROM books WHERE status=''ocr_done'' AND last_updated < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''30 minutes'';")
